message:
test(bd-bg1y): add caching.rs coverage for resources/read, prompts/get, and LRU internals

Cover resources/read and prompts/get caching paths, LRU expired entry
eviction, insert-replace size tracking, ToolCallCacheConfig derive
traits, CacheStats clone, and empty include/exclude allowing all tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
